race.comment: BE MORE PACIFIC (2) was beaten just a head last start at Ballina over 1310m. Has switched yards and will be better for it. Looks close to a win and gets his chance in this suitable contest. Gets his chance in this suitable contest. BURNT FINGERS (7) is Kembla Grange-trained and resumes with JVO in the saddle. Maps well and placed in a recent Kembla trial. No surprise to see her race boldly. BONJOUR BILL (4) resumed at Taree over 1000m, beaten 3 lengths. He has more to give with the extra fitness over the longer sprint and keeps the handy 2kg claim. MISS BUGATTI (10) had switched from a Sydney yard and needed the first-up outing over 1000m at Taree. Has a low gate and has shown enough to say she's a hope with the 4kg claim.
